mapper.select: SELECT * FROM xray_outbound_pool WHERE server_id = #{serverId} AND used = 0 ORDER BY outbound_index ASC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE xray_outbound_pool SET used = 1, used_by = #{clientId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE server_id = #{serverId} AND outbound_index = #{outboundIndex} AND used = 0
